name: feature.kb.agents
description: Knowledge Base feature agent pack (ADR 0014 Phase 3) — a manifest agent shipped by the KB feature whose tools are the feature.kb.nodes (search / rag) over the ctx.features.kb surface. The first feature-bound agent: a feature ships an agent tool-allowlisted to its own workflow surface (RFC 0003 agents[] + RFC 0002 §A14 allowlist).
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Knowledge Base Researcher
agents.description: Answers questions grounded in an org's Knowledge Base. Retrieves with feature.kb.nodes.search / feature.kb.nodes.rag (over ctx.features.kb), then composes a cited answer from the augmented context. Tools are allowlisted to the KB feature surface only.
